events.title: The Heart Collectors
events.description: The Heart Collectors are a Celtic-influenced folk band merging 60's and 70's Americana with ethereal soundscapes, featuring four-part vocal harmonies and instruments including cello, banjo, and mandolin. Finalists at the International Folk Music Awards 2025 for Album of the Year, they've built international momentum performing over 100 shows annually across major music festivals.

events.title: Windborne
events.description: Windborne is a vocal ensemble known for innovative arrangements of traditional songs that blend polyphonic vocal harmony with contemporary interpretation. Drawing on 20 years of study in polyphonic music worldwide, the four singers deliver emotionally resonant performances spanning continents and centuries while honoring folk music's tradition of social activism.

events.title: Joe Crookston
events.description: Joe Crookston is a dynamic Americana singer-songwriter and fiddle player who has toured with Gordon Lightfoot, headlined major US festivals, and received Folk Alliance International Album of the Year honors. Known for his infectious rhythm, poignant lyrics, and ability to create moments of transcendence on stage, he weaves together lap slide songs and American Southern tunes that draw audiences in.

events.title: Windborne
events.description: Windborne is a vocal ensemble known for innovative arrangements and bold harmonies that draw on deep roots in global vocal traditions.
